meaning: 麦哲伦海峡(在南美洲大陆南端和火地岛等岛屿之间,沟通太平洋和大西洋)
examples: When famous explorers like Columbus and da Gama and Magellan left Europe in their ships, they weren't looking for a new world.
The rocky views glimpsed by the Nearer Nine and other Russian landers suggested a tortured volcanic history that was confirmed in the early 1990s by the American Magellan orbiter.
Columbus, Magellan, and the other early sea explorers sailed in square-riggers.
Sixteenth-century Portuguese explorer Ferdinand Magellan set out from Seville, Spain, to circumnavigate the globe in 1519.
Magellan is killed en route, but one of his ships goes on to circumnavigate the world.
